member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.VersionChecking.VersionChecking.ConfigFirstLaunch
member.summary: The config value for whether this is the first launch.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.VersionChecking.VersionChecking.ConfigCheckVersions
member.summary: The config value for whether to check versions.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.VersionChecking.VersionChecking.Instance
member.summary: The instance of the version checking module.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.VersionChecking.VersionChecking.ClearVersions
member.summary: Clears the outdated flag on all plugins.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.VersionChecking.VersionChecking.CheckVersions
member.summary: Checks the versions of all plugins.
